open_findings: Step 1 requirements revised to address all 4 must_fix challenger findings (Copilot dependency gate, EU data-boundary controls, sandbox exfiltration defenses, abuse/safety controls).

decision_log.rationale: Only bootstrap artifacts exist; requirements artifact is not created yet.

decision_log.decision: Gate 1 approved with temporary risk acceptance
decision_log.rationale: User approved proceeding after Step 1 revision; remaining should-fix items deferred to architecture/planning.

decision_log.decision: Sandbox runtime: AKS Standard SLA with Pod Sandboxing (Kata Containers) on Spot D4as_v5 pool
decision_log.rationale: Kernel isolation between tenants without per-tenant cluster overhead; Spot reduces sandbox compute cost ~63%

decision_log.decision: Public edge: Azure Front Door Premium + WAF Premium
decision_log.rationale: Premium tier required for private origin link to ACA + managed rule sets + bot manager; Standard tier insufficient

decision_log.decision: State store: Cosmos DB Serverless with PITR
decision_log.rationale: Bursty MVP load with no min-RU floor; PITR meets RPO 12h

decision_log.decision: Network isolation: Azure CNI with Cilium dataplane + per-pod NetworkPolicy + DNS policy
decision_log.rationale: Native L4/L7 + DNS policy; meets sandbox exfiltration controls without an extra mesh

decision_log.decision: Region: single-region swedencentral with cold-restore to germanywestcentral
decision_log.rationale: Meets RPO 12h / RTO 24h within budget; multi-region active deferred
Within ,000–,000 envelope; floor cost ~$900 non-discretionary at security baseline

decision_log.decision: Step 2 round-1 revisions applied: 5 must-fix accepted (SB Premium, per-tenant KVs, UDR-forced Envoy egress, governance + EU + Copilot gates); 27 should-fix + 3 suggestions deferred to Step 4 / Step 3.5 via decisions sidecar
decision_log.rationale: User unavailable; took recommended path autonomously
Service Bus Standard $12 \u2192 Premium $677 for PE/VNet integration requirement
